calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Ms. Sheehy'S Formal Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

A dismissal of the entire action was filed on December 3, 2012. The Petition to Compel an Account and the status hearing were taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque.

Petition To Compel An Account And Report; For Surcharge Of Trustee Of The Victoria R. Armen Revocable Intervivos Trust;
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Ms. Sheehy'S Formal Accounting
Off Calendar Sep-25-2012 Continued To Dec-04-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Frank Kim for and with Millie Sheehy (Respondent). Brian Connors for and with Geradline Zanini.

Counsel agreed to a 60-day continuance to do mediation and try and resolve the matter. The status hearing and the Petition to Compel an Account, etc. were continued to December 4, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Ruiz.

Petition To Compel An Account And Report; For Surcharge Of Trustee Of The Victoria R. Armen Revocable Intervivos Trust;
Off Calendar Sep-25-2012 Continued To Dec-04-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Ms. Sheehy'S Formal Accounting
Off Calendar Aug-28-2012 Continued To Sep-25-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel An Account And Report; For Surcharge Of Trustee Of The Victoria R. Armen Revocable Intervivos Trust;
Off Calendar Aug-28-2012 Continued To Sep-25-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Ms. Sheehy'S Formal Accounting
Off Calendar Aug-14-2012 Continued To Aug-28-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel An Account And Report; For Surcharge Of Trustee Of The Victoria R. Armen Revocable Intervivos Trust;
Off Calendar Aug-14-2012 Continued To Aug-28-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Ms. Sheehy'S Formal Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-31-2012 Continued To Aug-14-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian Connors for and with Geraldine Zanini. Frank Kim for and with Mildred Sheehy (Respondent).

Mr. Connors requested a two week continuance stating that they wrote to Wells Fargo and that they have not heard back from them. Mr. Kim agreed to the continuance. The Petition to Compel An Account, etc. and status on Ms. Sheehy's formal accounting were continued to August 14, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

Petition To Compel An Account And Report; For Surcharge Of Trustee Of The Victoria R. Armen Revocable Intervivos Trust;
Off Calendar Jul-31-2012 Continued To Aug-14-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Ms. Sheehy'S Formal Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-17-2012 Continued To Jul-31-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Frank Kim for and with Mildred Sheehy (Respondent). Brian Connors for and with Geraldine Armen Zanini (Petitioner).

Mr. Kim stated that Attorney Patrick Quinn provided some documents to Mr. Connors. The Court encouraged the Parties to consider and talk about having a neutral party serve as Trustee. The Parties stepped out of the Courtroom to discuss the matter. Upon returning, the Parties reported that Mildred will resign as Trustee, that Mildred's Son will decline to serve as Successor Trustee and they will contact Wells Fargo Bank to see if they are willing to accept to serve as Successor Trustee. Status on Ms. Sheehy's accounting and the Petition to Compel an Account and Report were continued to July 31, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of a Successor Trustee.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

Petition To Compel An Account And Report; For Surcharge Of Trustee Of The Victoria R. Armen Revocable Intervivos Trust;
Off Calendar Jul-17-2012 Continued To Jul-31-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Ms. Sheehy'S Formal Accounting
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Continued To Jul-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian Connors for and with Geraldine Zanini (Petitioner). Frank Kim for and with Mildred Sheehy (Respondent). Patrick Quinn Tax Attorney for Mildred Sheehy.

Mr. Kim stated that he was just hired last week, that Mr. Quinn will be working on the accounting and that they agreed to a 60-day continuance. In addition, Mr. Kim stated that he agreed to provide Mr. Connors with a snap shot accounting of the current assets and liabilities of the Trust by June 5, 2012 and that he will file a response and objections within two weeks. The Petition to Compel An Account, etc. and status on Ms. Sheehy's formal accounting was continued to July 17, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Petition To Compel An Account And Report; For Surcharge Of Trustee Of The Victoria R. Armen Revocable Intervivos Trust;
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Continued To Jul-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel An Account And Report; For Surcharge Of Trustee Of The Victoria R. Armen Revocable Intervivos Trust;
Off Calendar Apr-10-2012 Continued To May-15-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian Connors for and with Geraldine Zanini. Mildred Sheehy in Propria Persona.

The Court ordered a formal accounting petition for approval from Ms. Sheehy for the period of December 16, 2003 (date of death) through December 31, 2011. Said accounting must be filed by May 15, 2012 and status of the accounting was also set for that same date. The Petition to Compel An Account and For Surcharge was also continued to May 15, 2012 at 9:00 a.m.., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Sheehy to obtain Counsel. Mr. Connors is to prepare a modified order reflecting the above.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Andrade/A. Payne.

Petition To Compel An Account And Report; For Surcharge Of Trustee Of The Victoria R. Armen Revocable Intervivos Trust;
Off Calendar Feb-28-2012 Continued To Apr-10-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Mishook made a special appearance for Mildred Armen Sheehy (Respondent). Brian Connors for Geraldine Armen Zanini.

Counsel agreed to a continuance. The Petition to Compel An Account and Report, etc. was continued to April 10, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.
